mapper.select:
select a.member_brand_id as memberBrandId, b.brand_name as memberBrandName, b.avator as memberBrandAvatar, b.mark as memberBrandMark, a.create_at from app_meetr_attendee a inner join brand b on a.member_brand_id = b.id
a.event_id = #{dto.eventId}
AND locate(#{dto.q}, b.brand_name) > 0
order by a.create_at desc
